# Cutover Readiness Pack

## Purpose
This document provides the consolidated readiness view for a production cutover, onboarding, migration, or phased release.

## 1. Cutover Scope
Describe what is changing, which business area is impacted, and what is included in the cutover.

## 2. In-Scope Systems
| Item | Type | Role in Cutover | Owner |
|---|---|---|---|
|  | System / Interface / Team / Process |  |  |

## 3. Readiness Criteria
| Area | Readiness Requirement | Owner | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| Business |  |  | Not Started / In Progress / Ready |
| Technology |  |  | Not Started / In Progress / Ready |
| Support |  |  | Not Started / In Progress / Ready |
| Controls |  |  | Not Started / In Progress / Ready |
